neighborhoods.name: Decatur
neighborhoods.description: Charming small-city-within-a-city east of Atlanta with a walkable downtown square, independent restaurants, and a strong arts community
neighborhoods.character: Walkable town center, progressive, family and retiree friendly, vibrant local dining

housing.predominantType: Craftsman bungalows, renovated cottages, and newer condos near the square

neighborhoods.character_notes: MARTA station in downtown Decatur provides easy rail access to midtown and airport. Excellent restaurants and craft beer scene. Very progressive community. Emory University nearby adds cultural richness.

neighborhoods.name: Virginia-Highland
neighborhoods.description: Eclectic intown neighborhood known for tree-lined streets, boutique shopping on Highland Avenue, and a strong sense of community
neighborhoods.character: Urban village, walkable, artsy, established residential with local shops and restaurants

housing.predominantType: 1920s bungalows, renovated Craftsman homes, and newer townhomes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Popular with active retirees and professionals. Highland Avenue has independent shops, restaurants, and cafes. Close to Piedmont Park and the BeltLine. No direct MARTA rail but bus routes serve the area.

neighborhoods.name: Buckhead
neighborhoods.description: Upscale north Atlanta district with luxury shopping, fine dining, high-rise condos, and proximity to top hospitals
neighborhoods.character: Affluent, urban, shopping and dining hub, medical corridor access

housing.predominantType: High-rise condos, luxury apartments, and estate homes on quiet side streets

neighborhoods.character_notes: Piedmont Hospital and numerous specialist offices in the medical corridor. Lenox Square and Phipps Plaza for shopping. MARTA Buckhead and Lenox stations. Higher cost but excellent amenities. Traffic congestion is significant.

neighborhoods.name: East Lake
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized neighborhood anchored by the historic East Lake Golf Club, with growing retail and a strong community development focus

housing.predominantType: Renovated bungalows, new-construction townhomes, and mixed-income housing

neighborhoods.character_notes: East Lake Foundation has driven significant community revitalization. MARTA East Lake station provides rail access. More affordable than intown neighborhoods. Close to Decatur. Drew Charter School is a national model.

neighborhoods.name: Marietta
neighborhoods.description: Historic suburb northwest of Atlanta with a charming town square, lower cost of living, and good access to Kennesaw Mountain trails
neighborhoods.character: Suburban town center, historic, affordable, family-oriented with outdoor access

housing.predominantType: Single-family homes, townhomes, and apartments near the square

neighborhoods.character_notes: Marietta Square is a walkable hub with restaurants, shops, and a theater. Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park is minutes away. WellStar Kennestone Hospital nearby. No MARTA rail — car required. Cobb County. Lower cost of living than intown Atlanta.
